user_message: I train at home with adjustable dumbbells up to 50 lbs and a pull-up bar, usually Monday, Wednesday, and Friday mornings before work. My main goal right now is putting on muscle in my arms and shoulders.
assistant_reply: Nice setup — dumbbells and a pull-up bar cover a lot. With three mornings a week we can build a solid upper-body focused split around that arm and shoulder goal.

expected.content: User trains at home with adjustable dumbbells up to 50 lbs and a pull-up bar.
User trains Monday, Wednesday, and Friday mornings before work.
User's main goal is putting on muscle in the arms and shoulders.
